text: Justice Department targets Cuban officials, aims for indictments - The Washington Post
fullText: The Justice Department has formed a working group to examine bringing federal charges against officials or entities within Cuba’s government.

text: Valve’s Steam Machine may not launch this year - The Verge
fullText: Valve confirms to The Verge that the Steam Machine, Steam Frame, and Steam Controller will ship in 2026, despite an earlier version of a blog post that suggested the timeline wasn’t as firm.

text: Measles is 'worse than expected' in Utah, officials say - NBC News

text: Trump admin announces $20 billion reinsurance program for oil tankers during Iran war - CNBC

text: Private Debt Should Face ‘Full-Blown Default Cycle,’ Pimco Says - Bloomberg.com
